**Type legend:**
- `sync` — outbound RPC call (gRPC / REST) matched to an inbound handler in another service.
- `async` — Kafka/messaging topic: producer service → consumer service, matched by topic name string.

- **{{service_name}}** ({{role}})

## [UNVERIFIED] Legend

All edges emitted by static analysis are `[UNVERIFIED]`. An edge becomes verified only when:
1. A human reviews and confirms the runtime routing, OR
2. A distributed-tracing integration (e.g. OpenTelemetry) confirms the call path.

Edges with no resolvable static target are **omitted** — not emitted as `[UNVERIFIED]`. Absence
means "not found statically", not "no edge exists".
